title: lobelia henricksonii
intro: Lobelia henricksonii, also known as Rocky Mountain lobelia, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues such as asthma, bronchitis, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lobelia henricksonii include relieving bronchial spasms, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Lobelia henricksonii often include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and relieve symptoms associated with respiratory conditions.
